summary: PDF Document Upload/Management feature testing complete. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Admin modal working, bulk button visible, per-product icon working. Shop: Related Downloads section working after fix to include supplier field in shop API response.

minor.issue: Review request says this endpoint needs auth, but implementation is public (no auth required). This may be intentional for frontend flexibility.

Backend APIs.POST /api/product-documents/by-products: PASS - Returns documents for multiple products
Backend APIs.POST /api/product-documents/{doc_id}/att: PASS - Attaches doc to more products

Frontend Admin.Bulk Upload PDFs button: PASS - Visible when products selected, shows count
Frontend Admin.Per-product PDF icon: PASS - FileText icon in Actions column, opens modal
Frontend Admin.Product Documents modal: PASS - Opens with upload form, document type dropdown, attached documents list

Frontend Shop.Related Downloads section: PASS - Shows when product has documents
Frontend Shop.Related Downloads hidden: PASS - Hidden when product has no documents
Frontend Shop.PDF download cards: PASS - SVG-based PDF icons with document names

bug_fixed.issue: Shop product API was not returning supplier field, causing Related Downloads section to never show

critical_code_review_comments: The POST /api/product-documents/by-products endpoint doesn't require auth but review request says it should. Consider adding auth if this is admin-only functionality.
Object storage integration uses Emergent's storage API correctly with proper error handling.
seed_data_creation: Test PDF document uploaded and deleted during testing. Original test document (id: 1a09ba4e-e029-4787-9c64-254a7ed29eff) preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF document upload/management feature is fully working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_product_documents.py cover all endpoints. The shop API now includes supplier field for Related Downloads to work. Test product with document: LEPORCE|||LPT OLYMPIA BLANC 120x120 (doc_id: 1a09ba4e-e029-4787-9c64-254a7ed29eff).
